sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3606" key="a)kro/pastos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρό-παστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πάσσω</etym>) <sense id="n3606.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sprinkled on the surface: slightly salted</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1682.tlg001:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sopat.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1009.tlg001:76" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">76</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
